## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on GrowthX.ai's customer success strategies and potential consulting engagement with Ella Dillon.](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai needs to systematize capturing early customer signals and improve communication of value](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Ella to provide quick, deep recommendations on customer-facing processes and CSM training](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
  - [Marcel to share access to GrowthX.ai's Notion workspace and relevant meeting recordings for Ella's review](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Potential short-term, intensive consulting engagement to be proposed by Ella](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai's Current Challenges

  - [Balancing service and product offerings while embracing "messy" growth](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Need to systematize capturing early customer signals and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Improving communication of value and work being done to customers](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Ensuring consistent quality as the company scales rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)

### Customer Success Strategies

  - [Weekly 30-minute customer meetings currently in place](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Considering implementation of QBRs or strategic reviews](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Need for better training on customer engagement, asking the right questions, and uncovering opportunities/risks](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Importance of maintaining high-level relationships (e.g., with CEOs) to prevent churn](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Internal Structure and Processes

  - [Company divided into "Deliver" (client-facing) and "Build" (EPD and business operations) teams](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Implementing a 12-week onboarding curriculum for new hires](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Using Notion for documentation and workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [Recording all customer calls for review and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)

### Potential Consulting Engagement

  - [Ella to review GrowthX.ai's current processes and materials](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Focus on quick, intensive recommendations rather than long-term engagement](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
  - [Emphasis on customer journey design and critical customer touchpoints](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Potential to provide training assets and agendas for CSMs](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to provide Ella access to GrowthX.ai's Notion workspace and relevant meeting recordings](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Ella to draft a proposal for a short-term, intensive consulting engagement](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1941.0)
  - [Schedule a meeting between Ella and Matthew (Chief Content Officer) to discuss further](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)
  - [Ella to review provided materials and develop recommendations for customer-facing processes and CSM training](https://fathom.video/share/pbr5Yd5HrRdKo_GGY7_ZphPtq3RRh379?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
